s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' (↑s \ {i}))

z : V
c : ι → 𝕜

hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
hc : ∀ i ∈ s, c i = 1
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
⊢ (↑(s \ {i}).card)⁻¹ • ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {i}, x x_1 = y i

          exact ⟨hj, rfl⟩)
      have hw₁' : ∑ j in s \ {i}, w (x j) = 1 := by
        simpa [Finset.sum_image, Finset.image_image, Function.comp] using hw₁
      simpa [centerMass, hw₁', hx, hxiz]
